reviews.review_description:
VirZOOM’s new software tech for moving freely in virtual worlds is amazing. I’ve been loving their stationary-bike-based games since 2016 and now we have the same sense of freedom with no bike required. These Motion Labs games are just teasers and testers, post about your experience so your ideas get included. I can’t wait for what’s to come.  

I’m also a VirZOOM investor and this new innovation makes me really excited about the potential of my investment. If you feel the same way you can invest too at StartEngine.com.

MotionLabs games are demo for VirZOOM’s new body-as-joystick motion tech. I did it. My daughter and her friends did it. We can go crazy fast without motion sickness.  In the road and the tank games, there’s hours of fun and social battle as you huck fireballs at your friends, other players or AI tanks and cyclists. This builds on VZFit (in the Quest Store) games which work standing or (better) cycling (you just need a cadence sensor). Hoping the new MotionLabs motion control quickly finds its way into all VR games that need motion.
